seo.title: Rafli Aulia Al Giffari | Fullstack Developer
seo.description: Portfolio of Rafli Aulia Al Giffari — Fullstack Developer & AI Enthusiast specializing in web applications, Laravel, Vue.js, and AI integration.

about.p1: With a foundation in Software Engineering, I approach development as a craft. My journey is defined by a relentless pursuit of technical excellence, from mastering complex PHP frameworks to architecting high-performance modern frontends.
about.p2: My current focus lies in AI Integration, bridging the gap between static applications and intelligent, adaptive digital ecosystems. Every line of code I write is a commitment to performance and scalability.

kami_yayuk.title: SI-MAKEUP
kami_yayuk.description: A web-based booking platform developed for professional makeup artists. The system enables customers to browse services, schedule appointments, verify bookings through OTP authentication, submit payment confirmations, and track booking status through an integrated management system.

exp_1.desc: Participated in academic and organizational activities, collaborated with fellow students in technology-related programs, and assisted in planning academic development initiatives.

exp_2.role: Asset & Inventory Administration Intern - DPRD Banjarbaru
exp_2.desc: Assisted in recording and managing office assets and inventory data, maintained accurate documentation, and supported administrative processes related to asset management.

exp_3.desc: Participated in scouting and leadership development activities, assisted in organizing events, and supported character-building and community service initiatives.
